metadata.content: Customer said they need a faster onboarding process and fewer manual handoffs between teams.
The statement of work calls for a discovery phase to identify business goals, pain points, and future state requirements.
Existing flows are documented as email threads and spreadsheets, making traceability difficult.
Current process requires too many manual approvals and lacks a centralized source of truth.
